title: lasiopogon minutus
intro: Lasiopogon minutus, also known as the small button grass or button grass, is a type of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Lasiopogon minutus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
